checks.finding: Each of REQ-001..REQ-006 names a concrete artifact/schema/function with observable behavior (e.g. REQ-001's loop-inventory.json fields including now-present cap_kind; REQ-002's loop_fixture_init/drive_review_round/assert_artifacts_schema/assert_terminal functions; REQ-004's python3-absent deterministic-runtime-unavailable degradation). Every requirement is backed by grep-able/schema-checkable ACs (AC-001..AC-018) with negative self-checks, giving an implementer and verifier a concrete pass/fail surface.

REQ-001->AC-001..004; REQ-002->AC-005..007; REQ-003->AC-008..010; REQ-004->AC-011..013 (plus AC-018); REQ-005->AC-004/008/013..015; REQ-006->AC-016. Every stated goal has at least one matching acceptance criterion in acceptance-tests.md's Requirement column.

Acceptance criteria describe externally observable/measurable outcomes rather than intent: e.g. AC-002 specifies a grep-matchable cap value with a mutation-based negative self-check, AC-009 specifies a RED-differential against a named parent commit, AC-012 specifies deleting a literal '- Task ID:' line to force red, AC-017 specifies a printed wall-clock value with a >300s self-fail.

Non-goals explicitly excludes re-fixing #143 (already fixed upstream), modifying any protected gate/precheck/validator/hook file, A5-A7 and Pillar B (issues #145-#148 named individually), building #125's harness itself, and tasks.md/traceability.md as Phase 2 artifacts.

Security Boundaries table (B1-B3) states auth/authz, PII classification ('synthetic fixtures only'/'internal source only'), and mktemp/non-decreasing-guard constraints; Assumptions section states ancestry/stability preconditions (2d8c6a5 in mainline, check-quality-gate-cycle-limit.sh landed); Roles and Permissions plus REQ-006 state the version-bump-only-via-scripts/bump-version.sh approval boundary and OQ-5 human sign-off ownership.

The Risks section's two Critical risks (cap-drift narrowing enforcement; harness fixtures diverging from real gate semantics = false green) and the High risk (CI runtime cost) each cite a concrete validation surface (bidirectional AC-002 drift check with ADR-0009 dual-update pattern; negative self-checks AC-001/002/007/010/012; AC-017 in-suite runtime-budget self-fail). Medium risks (RED-differential ancestry, brownfield-before-seed) are likewise tied to AC-009's recorded-evidence procedure and AC-005's synthetic-seed mechanism.
